dialogue_texts: Marisa
I was told Yumemura was a bit "off," but this mansion is practically screaming for a royal renovation.
Marisa
Is anyone home, or do I have to break the door down myself?
A Queen who breaks into homes? How unrefined. What brings such a noisy guest to our gates?
Marisa
I'm looking for the source of that "glohm" stench. It's making the air too thick for a proper festival.
Marisa
And who are you? A giant snake playing dress-up?
Saika
I am Saika Tatsumaru, an admin of the Order and a protector of this manor.
Saika
You've already beaten my sister Ryuuko, haven't you? I can smell her scales on your broom.
Marisa
Oh, the blue one? She was a bit damp.
Marisa
You literally look like you've got a bit more fire.
Saika
My "serpentine flame" isn't just for show. It purifies the uninvited. And this mansion is Order territory.
Saika
If you don't leave, you'll be reduced to ash before you can crown yourself anything else.
Marisa
Ash? Sounds like a waste of good magic.
Marisa
As the Queen, I'm declaring this mansion "tax-exempt" once I kick you out. Move aside, snake-lady!
Saika
Then let's see if your "Master Spark" can outshine a siren's burning wrath!
